scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck
scripts.build: tsx scripts/gen-icons.tsx && tsx scripts/verify-icons.ts && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/validate-lenses.mts && next build && node --experimental-strip-types scripts/check-static-routes.mts
scripts.build:cf: wrangler types --env-interface CloudflareEnv && npx opennextjs-cloudflare build && npx opennextjs-cloudflare populateCache remote
scripts.//preview: Local production preview on the REAL workerd runtime. Runs `opennextjs-cloudflare build` then `preview` — NOT `build:cf`, because build:cf ends in `populateCache remote` which touches the live Cloudflare account; `preview` does its own LOCAL cache populate. preview only serves the last build, so the build step is required for code changes to appear. Use before merging route/render/next-config changes to catch CF-only regressions `next dev`/`next start` cannot show (e.g. #397, where dynamicParams=false 404'd every detail page only on workerd).
scripts.//start: next start = Next's own Node production server. NOT our deploy path (we ship Cloudflare workerd via OpenNext) and nothing in dev/CI/deploy runs it. Kept only as a local Node baseline for localizing bugs: if `next start` serves a page but `npm run preview` 404s it, the fault is in the OpenNext adapter (cf #397).
scripts.nuke: pkill -f 'next dev' 2>/dev/null; pkill -f 'next-server' 2>/dev/null; rm -rf .next; echo 'Cache cleared. Run npm run dev to restart.'
